prompt: Using the provided reference image as the identity source, regenerate the same man with his facial features matching the reference as closely as possible. Transform the portrait into a warm, low-angle cinematic night photo: the man is leaning back in a chair in a relaxed pose, wearing a thin, slightly wrinkled dark shirt instead of the formal suit, with one hand holding a glass of amber drink. Add a large soft, blurry orange flame on the right side of the frame, occupying the foreground and casting flickering warm highlights across his face and shirt. Replace the studio background with a dim, slightly out-of-focus interior or nighttime setting in amber and brown tones, creating a melancholic, intimate, slightly nostalgic atmosphere. Make it look like a modern digital camera or smartphone photo shot at high ISO: visible film-like grain, low contrast, shallow depth of field, and subtle chromatic aberration for atmosphere.
